Mashed Potato Casserole

author: Mary Germick

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 3 lb potatoes, cooked & drained
  • 1/2 stick Butter
  • 12 oz. Sour Cream
  • 1 1/4 tsp. Pepper
  • 1 1/2 tsp. Salt
  • Bread Crumbs

Directions

  1. Mash first 5 ingredients together.
  2. Top with buttered bread crumbs.
  3. Refrigerate till needed.
  4. Bake @ 350 for 1 hour.
